results.title: Impellers Specifications - GlobalSpec
results.snippet: Find Impellers on GlobalSpec by specifications. Impellers are rotating devices that force liquids, gases and vapors in a desired direction. They are widely used in pumping, blowing, and mixing applications.

results.title: Impeller | KSB
results.snippet: Impeller An impeller is a rotating component equipped with vanes or blades used in turbomachinery (e.g. centrifugal pumps). Flow deflection at the impeller vanes allows mechanical power (energy at the vanes) to be converted into pump power output.

results.title: Centrifugal fan | ZIEHL-ABEGG | C series
results.snippet: Product specification: Free-running impeller with 7 backward-curved blades in dimensions of 225 to 1,120 mm. Impeller made of sheet steel with surface protection provided by powder coating. Version with hub (taper lock or fixed hub) and inlet nozzle with measurement device for air flow measurement.

results.title: Complete Guide to Impeller Selection - Types, Uses and How do they Work
results.snippet: Impeller size refers to the dimensions of the impeller, including its diameter, width, and blade geometry. The size of the impeller directly affects pump performance, including flow rate, head pressure, and efficiency.

results.title: Impeller Size - an overview | ScienceDirect Topics
results.snippet: Impeller size refers to the dimensions of the impeller in a pump, which can significantly affect pump efficiency and is characterized by its diameter and shape.
